questions.scenario: A legacy import worker needs host-level packages and a monitoring agent that expects a normal Linux server. Which runtime is the honest starting point?
questions.explanation: Host-level requirements point toward the server-shaped runtime.

questions.scenario: The platform team needs Kubernetes operators and policy controllers for several services. Which runtime is now worth considering?
questions.explanation: Kubernetes-specific platform requirements are strong reasons to consider GKE.

questions.scenario: Which runtime mappings fit the article?

options.text: Receipt side work -> Cloud Run functions.
Simple container API -> GKE only because it is a container.

questions.explanation: The runtime should match the workload shape and operating reason.
